name: checkbox-group
description: Group of Checkbox items sharing a value array, with group label, error message, and helper text.

props.name: options
props.description: Array of option objects, each with label, value, and optional description and disabled

props.name: value
props.description: Array of currently selected option values

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Callback invoked with the updated selection array when an option is toggled

props.name: label
props.description: Group label rendered above the checkboxes

props.name: error
props.description: Error message rendered below the group; also changes the label color

props.name: helperText
props.description: Helper text rendered below the group; hidden when an error is present

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables all checkboxes in the group

props.name: containerStyle
props.description: Additional style applied to the outer container
